description: Official Tsuki parser template index. The app checks this file at startup and pulls any template the user doesn't have locally.

templates.name: Madara
templates.description: WordPress Madara theme — covers 500+ sites including MangaKakalot clones, Asura mirrors, and most popular English scanlation WordPress installs.

templates.name: MangaThemesia
templates.description: MangaThemesia WordPress child theme used by Reaperscans, Asuracomic, and modern scanlation groups.

templates.name: MangaStream
templates.description: WPManga / MangaStream theme — used by Toonily, MangaStream mirrors, and similar sites.

templates.name: ZeistManga
templates.description: Blogger/Blogspot-based manga sites using the Atom JSON feed. Works on 50+ Indonesian/Spanish/Arabic scanlation blogs. Auto-detects via Blogger Atom endpoint probe.

templates.name: Keyoapp
templates.description: Keyoapp scanlation CMS — used by AsuraScans, FingerScans, Luminous Scans, and 12+ English groups. Auto-detects via keyoapp HTML marker.

templates.name: HeanCms
templates.description: HeanCms JSON REST API platform — used by ReaperScans, FlameScans, VoidScans. Auto-detects via /api/series endpoint probe.

templates.name: Madtheme
templates.description: Madtheme Bootstrap manga theme — used by MangaKomi, Zinmanga, and 10+ aggregators. Auto-detects via book-item HTML fingerprint.

templates.name: FoolSlide
templates.description: FoolSlide2 open-source scanlation CMS — used by many scanlation group sites (Fallen Angels, Helvetica, etc.).

templates.name: Liliana
templates.description: Liliana CMS — modern PHP manga platform. Used by KulManga, Manga-Raw.club, and international portals. Auto-detects via latest-updated fingerprint.

templates.name: Mangabox
templates.description: Mangabox / Mangakakalot-successor CMS — used by Mangakakalot.to, MangaBox, and 7+ derivatives. Auto-detects via content-genres-item fingerprint.

templates.name: Mmrcms
templates.description: PHP Manga CMS (MMRCMS) — powers 17+ sites including MangaReader.org, Mangaeden, IsekaiScan. Auto-detects via filterList + chapter-item fingerprints.

templates.name: MangaReader
templates.description: MangaReader.to card-grid layout. Covers MangaReader.cc, Mangaread.org, ReadMangaFree.net.

templates.name: WpComics
templates.description: WordPress WpComics theme — Madara family variant used by Vietnamese and multilingual aggregators. Auto-detects via tim-truyen fingerprint.

templates.name: AnimeBootstrap
templates.description: AnimeBootstrap/Komikcast theme — used by 50+ Indonesian and international scanlation sites. Auto-detects via chapternum/chapterdate fingerprints.

templates.name: Scan
templates.description: Generic scan/reader CMS used by smaller regional scanlation group sites.

templates.name: Gattsu
templates.description: Gattsu theme — lightweight manga CMS used by Brazilian and Spanish scanlation groups. Auto-detects via manga-list-item fingerprint.

templates.name: MangaHub
templates.description: MangaHub CMS — used by MangaHub.io and derivative readers.
